education.degree: 城市规划 工学硕士
education.description: 导师：苏万庆教授、关金平教授。获特等奖学金（2024、2025，前20%）。
education.descriptionEn: Supervisors: Prof. Su Wanqing, Prof. Guan Jinping. Special Grade Scholarship 2024, 2025 (top 20%).

education.degree: 城市规划 工学学士
education.description: GPA: 3.3/4.0。获校级优秀团员、校园文化特别贡献奖。
education.descriptionEn: GPA: 3.3/4.0. Outstanding Youth League Member, Special Contribution Award of Campus Culture.

experience.role: 城市创新群体活动模式研究
experience.roleEn: Activity Patterns of Urban Innovative Groups
experience.description: 基于3.1万+ GPS记录，分析创新与非创新群体的多日活动-出行模式；使用聚类和GIS空间分析方法。
experience.descriptionEn: Analyzed multi-day activity-travel patterns using 31,000+ GPS records; employed clustering and GIS spatial analysis.

experience.role: 亚热带城市道路环境对骑行路线选择的影响
experience.roleEn: Impact of Subtropical Urban Road Environments on Cycling Route Choice
experience.description: 研究深圳环境与基础设施因素如何影响骑行者非通勤路线选择；构建OLS模型量化自然与建成环境的影响。
experience.descriptionEn: Examined how environmental and infrastructural factors shape cyclists' non-commuting route choices in Shenzhen; built OLS models to quantify effects.

experience.company: MIT / 哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）
experience.role: 货运与物流调查：车辆与货运追踪数据收集方法
experience.description: 收集托运人、承运人、司机等多方数据；开发调查平台并开展试点研究验证可行性。
experience.descriptionEn: Collected data from shippers, carriers, and drivers; developed a survey platform and pilot study to prove feasibility.
